did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review/survey of Salient Object Detection (SOD) techniques and databases. While it discusses and cites previous works that used AI/ML (e.g., SVMs, deep learning) for melanoma segmentation (e.g., references [46], [47], [50]), this specific paper does not perform any original experiments, nor does it use AI to obtain new results in dermatology. It only analyzes existing literature and benchmarks.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
